latest_changes: Call Auto-Download: Resolved an issue that prevented calls from being automatically downloaded after sessions, ensuring that all call recordings are properly saved and accessible.

Dynamic WPM Adjustment: Introduced a new feature that allows users to dynamically adjust words per minute (WPM) during calls, providing greater flexibility in pacing and improving communication effectiveness.
Customizable Voice Profiles: Added the ability for users to create and customize their own voice profiles, allowing for a more personalized and engaging user experience during calls.
Prospect Interruption Mute: Resolved an issue where the system failed to mute the microphone when a prospect interrupted, ensuring a more seamless conversation flow.
Audio Engine Startup: Addressed a critical bug in the audio engine startup process related to scipy bundling, resulting in improved stability and faster initialization times.
Microphone Selection: Fixed a problem where users were unable to select their preferred microphone, enhancing user control over audio input settings.

history.notes: Inflection Control, Dynamic WPM Adjustment, Customizable Voice Profiles
Fixed Prospect Interruption Mute, Fixed Audio Engine Startup (scipy bundling), Fixed Microphone Selection, Fixed Call Auto-Download.
changes: Single-Session Enforcement: Only one device can be logged in at a time. Signing in on a new device automatically kicks the previous session.
Session Guard: Background polling detects when your session has been superseded and redirects to the login screen with a clear message.
Secure Session Tokens: Each login registers a unique session token in the database, ensuring reliable device-level session tracking.

history.notes: Smart Server Selection, Enhanced Update UI, Improved Connection Stability, Call Session Persistence, Metric Refinement, WebRTC VAD.
